fontSubstitution: The source references a missing BudokanRoundedBold-WyyeO.ttf. Validation substitutes the supplied Pixels Medium TTF in Blender and GN-VM, with embedded outlines as the browser fallback.
validation: Exact Blender topology across all six validation cases, including the overlapping-contour Character Spacing 0.7 case. Four-decimal local bounds differ by at most 0.0001 units. Authored mode preserves chrome.002 and its all-zero FACE-domain rough field across all 11,296 faces. The matched-font, local-space studio comparison measures 0.9867 silhouette IoU, 0.0486 macro luminance MAE, and +0.0113 mean luminance error; the residual is Eevee/Three.js reflection filtering and highlight placement.
